topic: memory_context structural channel routing — intent reliability, merged response shape, envelope coverage
researchQuestions: RQ1: What signals reliably distinguish structural queries from semantic queries? Quantify false-positive/false-negative against v1.0.3 corpus + Phase E gold battery.
RQ2: What's the right merged response shape — flatten, discriminated union, or split-payload? Evaluate against existing consumers and v1.0.3 corpus.
RQ3: Does SearchDecisionEnvelope already cover routing trace via selectedChannels/skippedChannels/routingReasons? What new fields are needed, if any?
